title: AT Fields
wikitext:
[]: AT Fields (ITT Massive Spoilers!)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Jul 12, 2009 4:39 pm What was up with Zeruel's multilayer AT Field? And what was up with the AT Field arm attack that Shinji used to knock Zer about several football fields away?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:15 pm they're flashy and magic

[]:             Quote Post by Sorend » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:16 pm Well wasn't AT field manipulation present in the original series ? Sahaquiel was able to use it's AT field in different manners than most of the other angels, and so was Unit 2 in EoE. Plus Zeruels multi layer AT Field looked amazing, it was probably done more for aesthetics

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Jul 12, 2009 7:51 pm I think the multi-layer A.T. field would be more impressive artistically to show multiple layers being pushed back. Just one AT Field layer being pushed back by Unit-02's would look a little more ridiculous than multiple layers being pushed back. It also shows how impregnable Zeruel's defense really is. I wonder if the innermost AT Field layer is the weakest. And about those blocks that came from Unit-01: Who knows. It was kinda weak...

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:43 am AT field haxmagic for the arm this time instead of regrowing using zeruel's particle wave matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Jul 13, 2009 12:32 pm Rebuild ATF's can do anything -Anything!-

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:16 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: ATF's can do anything -Anything!-

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:21 pm It's interesting that Unit-01 is the first eva this time round to use it's AT-field offensively, before we didn't see that sort of thing until 02 vs The Harpies in EOE. Even then the level of mastery shown in Rebuild was far beyond just point and explode (now we've got ATF arms and magic spinning blocks). EDIT: Also did anyone else notice when 01 blasted Zeruel away the AT field transformed a little bit like Ramiel did in 1.0? Reference to the angels and eva being not so different maybe? Or I'm just looking too much into it...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jul 13, 2009 3:45 pm master_lloyd wrote: It's interesting that Unit-01 is the first eva this time round to use it's AT-field offensively, before we didn't see that sort of thing until 02 vs The Harpies in EOE. Even then the level of mastery shown in Rebuild was far beyond just point and explode (now we've got ATF arms and magic spinning blocks).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 13, 2009 4:01 pm Combs wrote: AT field haxmagic for the arm this time instead of regrowing using zeruel's particle wave matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jul 13, 2009 4:40 pm well she did nearly become an energy being right afterwards. Curse you kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Jul 13, 2009 9:42 pm Reichu, are you saying that Eva01 did not in fact create a new arm but simply used her ATF to form the workings of an arm and it will vanish once the Sync lowers?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jul 13, 2009 9:44 pm it did vanish. as soon as 01 gets lanced it disappears and you can sorta see a stump instead of an arm

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Jul 14, 2009 5:47 am Ornette wrote: Eva-01 uses ATF offensively during Zeruel in the TV series.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Jul 14, 2009 5:51 am NGE Unit-01 is much more efficient with her AT field offensive though. One swipe of a hand and Zeruel is down for the count.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 14, 2009 7:31 am Fazmotron wrote: NGE Unit-01 is much more efficient with her AT field offensive though. One swipe of a hand and Zeruel is down for the count.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 7:33 am Seems they will have to replace the Arm along with a few other things on Eva 01. Then there is the Core (2) the Lance, the children frozen within her, the lack of S2 as far as we know right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Jul 14, 2009 9:00 am Reichu wrote: I was a little disappointed that that didn't incorporate that maneuver. The "total body laceration + giant blood splatter on ATF" was awfully cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 9:22 am You can do whatever you wish as long as you got that field it seems. Its like technologic but with an ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:09 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: You can do whatever you wish as long as you got that field it seems. Its like technologic but with an ATF.
